transcript: I'M NOT EVEN GETTING MARRIED! OKAY, THIS IS A QUESTION FOR SCIENCE FICTION WRITERS. I CAN'T BELIEVE YOU'RE NOT PICKING ME. HEY, HOW COULD IT NOT BE ME? I'M NOT EVEN... I DON'T EVEN... ALL RIGHT, YOU KNOW WHAT? THAT'S IT. FROM NOW ON, JOEY, I WANT YOU TO BE MY BEST MAN. YES! SHAME ABOUT YOU, THOUGH.
